name: WF-1.9 — GitHub Pipeline → Gmail + WhatsApp + Jira

parameters.content:
## WF-1.9 — GitHub Pipeline → Gmail + WhatsApp + Jira

**Trigger:** Webhook POST `/webhook/bupa-pipeline-result`
GitHub Actions llama este endpoint al finalizar el job `notify`.

**Payload esperado:**
```
{
  "pipeline": "BUPA Portal Pacientes",
  "status": "PASSED" | "FAILED",
  "branch": "master",
  "actor": "jaime1992",
  "run_url": "https://github.com/..."
}
```

**Si FAILED:** Gmail ❌ + WhatsApp + Jira Task
**Si PASSED:** Gmail ✅ solo (sin WhatsApp ni Jira)

**Requisito para CI:** Configurar secret `N8N_WEBHOOK_URL` en GitHub con la URL pública de este webhook. Para pruebas locales usar ngrok:
`ngrok http 5678` → copiar URL → agregar `/webhook/bupa-pipeline-result`

**Autor:** Jaime Quiñelen | Bupa Chile QA | Mayo 2026
